SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.amd64

Enum Class ElfRelocationType_amd64

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ElfRelocationType_amd64>
net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.amd64.ElfRelocationType_amd64
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ElfRelocationType_amd64>, Constable, ElfRelocationType
public enum ElfRelocationType_amd64 extends Enum<ElfRelocationType_amd64> implements ElfRelocationType
AMD64 (x86-64) relocation types. These constants define the relocation mechanisms specific to the x86-64 architecture.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    R_X86_64_16
    Direct 16-bit zero-extended.
    R_X86_64_32
    Direct 32-bit zero-extended.
    R_X86_64_32S
    Direct 32-bit sign-extended.
    R_X86_64_64
    Direct 64-bit.
    R_X86_64_8
    Direct 8-bit sign-extended.
    R_X86_64_CODE_4_GOTPC32_TLSDESC
    GOTPC32_TLSDESC relaxation with 4-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_4_GOTPCRELX
    GOTPCRELX relaxation with 4-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_4_GOTTPOFF
    GOTTPOFF relaxation with 4-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_5_GOTPC32_TLSDESC
    GOTPC32_TLSDESC relaxation with 5-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_5_GOTPCRELX
    GOTPCRELX relaxation with 5-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_5_GOTTPOFF
    GOTTPOFF relaxation with 5-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_6_GOTPC32_TLSDESC
    GOTPC32_TLSDESC relaxation with 6-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_6_GOTPCRELX
    GOTPCRELX relaxation with 6-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_CODE_6_GOTTPOFF
    GOTTPOFF relaxation with 6-byte displacement.
    R_X86_64_COPY
    Copy symbol at runtime.
    R_X86_64_DTPMOD64
    ID of module containing symbol.
    R_X86_64_DTPOFF32
    Offset in TLS block.
    R_X86_64_DTPOFF64
    Offset in module's TLS block.
    R_X86_64_GLOB_DAT
    Create GOT entry.
    R_X86_64_GOT32
    32-bit GOT entry.
    R_X86_64_GOTOFF64
    64-bit offset to GOT.
    R_X86_64_GOTPC32
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to GOT.
    R_X86_64_GOTPC32_TLSDESC
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to TLS descriptor.
    R_X86_64_GOTPCREL
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to GOT.
    R_X86_64_GOTPCRELX
    Load from 32-bit signed PC relative offset to GOT entry without REX prefix.
    R_X86_64_GOTTPOFF
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to GOT entry for IE symbol.
    R_X86_64_IRELATIVE
    Adjust indirectly by program base.
    R_X86_64_JUMP_SLOT
    Create PLT entry.
    R_X86_64_NONE
    No relocation.
    R_X86_64_PC16
    16-bit sign-extended PC relative.
    R_X86_64_PC32
    PC relative 32-bit signed.
    R_X86_64_PC32_BND
    PC relative 32-bit signed with BND prefix (deprecated).
    R_X86_64_PC64
    PC relative 64-bit.
    R_X86_64_PC8
    8-bit sign-extended PC relative.
    R_X86_64_PLT32
    32-bit PLT address.
    R_X86_64_PLT32_BND
    32-bit PLT address with BND prefix (deprecated).
    R_X86_64_RELATIVE
    Adjust by program base.
    R_X86_64_RELATIVE64
    64-bit adjust by program base.
    R_X86_64_REX_GOTPCRELX
    Load from 32-bit signed PC relative offset to GOT entry with REX prefix.
    R_X86_64_SIZE32
    Size of symbol plus 32-bit addend.
    R_X86_64_SIZE64
    Size of symbol plus 64-bit addend.
    R_X86_64_TLSDESC
    TLS descriptor.
    R_X86_64_TLSDESC_CALL
    TLS descriptor call.
    R_X86_64_TLSGD
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to two GOT entries for GD symbol.
    R_X86_64_TLSLD
    32-bit signed PC relative offset to two GOT entries for LD symbol.
    R_X86_64_TPOFF32
    Offset in initial TLS block.
    R_X86_64_TPOFF64
    Offset in initial TLS block.
